description: Use this API to add a participating branch flow variable to a specified linear constraint dependency equation in the working case. It may also be used to modify an existing record. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = opf_lnceqn_brflow(iqid, eibus, ejbus, ekbus, cktid, flwid, coeff)
python_syntax: ierr = opf_lnceqn_brflow(iqid, eibus, ejbus, ekbus, cktid, flwid, coeff)

parameters.name: iqid
parameters.description: Linear constraint equation identification number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: eibus
parameters.description: From bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ejbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ekbus
parameters.description: Third bus number for a three-winding transformer and zero for a two-winding transformer. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: flwid
parameters.description: Branch flow identifier. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: coeff
parameters.description: Value of the coefficient associated with the equation variable. (input; Default value of 1.0 if new record, current value otherwise., by default).

error_codes.description: specified linear constraint equation does not exist.
participating equation variable table is full.
specified three-winding transformer does not exist.
flow constraint does not exist at the specified branch.
flow constraint does not exist at the specified three-winding transformer.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
